title: GUI 77
description: GUI in the style of Cyberpunk 2077
body:
|![Welcome to GUI 77!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35e73d9eea18bc53066283346e45d67b286c312e.png)|
|:-:|
|GUI 77 is a resource pack that aims to change Vanilla and some Modded GUIs, HUDs, SFX and Music into the style of Cyberpunk 2077
**Contains copyrighted music. All of the rights for it belong to CD PROJEKT RED.**|\

Development plan: GUI 77 will stay on 1.20.1 with the support of some specific mods until the June of 2026, after that it will be updated to the newest versions but only for Vanilla (Modded support will either be stopped, removed entirely or turned into a separate project driven by other people that would like to help)

I made it for personal use but then decided that it will turn out really great in the end so i should let other people use it :)
